name: World of Hyatt Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 60,000 bonus Hyatt points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months OR 2 free nights at Hyatt hotels (up to 40,000 points each = 80,000 max) after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 9x total points per $1 (4x from card + 5x as Discoverist) at Hyatt properties
2x bonus points on your top 3 spend categories each quarter (from Nov 2025: up to $100 Hyatt credits annually)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
annual_credits.description: One complimentary anniversary night at any Hyatt Category 1-4 hotel (up to 15,000 points)

other_benefits.name: Automatic Hyatt Discoverist Status
other_benefits.description: Hyatt Discoverist status (10% bonus on base points earned, preferred upgrades, late checkout, and more)

other_benefits.name: 5 Tier-Qualifying Nights
other_benefits.description: 5 bonus tier-qualifying nights credited each year toward Hyatt elite status

other_benefits.name: Extra Hour
other_benefits.description: 1 extra hour of checkout time at Hyatt hotels (in addition to Discoverist late checkout)

other_benefits.name: World of Hyatt 2025 Enhancement
other_benefits.description: Up to $100 in Hyatt credits annually on the top 3 quarterly categories (from November 2025)

notes: $199 AF is justified by the anniversary night (Cat 1-4, worth $100-200) + Discoverist status + 5 tier nights. Hyatt points are among the most valuable (1.5-2¢/point). 9x at Hyatt is excellent earning. The 2025 refresh added quarterly category bonus (2x) and up to $100 annual Hyatt credits. One of the best mid-tier hotel cards.
